research_question: Does adding low-volatility back to the momentum-only v4 scheme improve fixed-test stability while preserving most of the v4 relative performance improvement?
score_rule: mean(percentile_rank(momentum_60_5 DESC), percentile_rank(volatility_20d ASC)); require min_feature_count >= 2

engineering_experiment.note: Chunk-size observation is engineering-only and must not be interpreted as a strategy degree of freedom.

notes: This round changes exactly one core dimension: score composition.
TopK, execution semantics, benchmark contract, cost contract, and data snapshot are frozen.
